text.title: Database Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for database-design.

decision-tree.root-question: Is storage a transactional RDBMS with multi-table relational data?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — schema too thin to justify spec process
BLOCK — split into expand and contract releases
BLOCK — move logic to application layer
BLOCK — justify with EXPLAIN or remove
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: RDBMS + 6 entities + expand-then-contract migration → first three branches do not match → no triggers → all indexes paired → all_constraints_at_db=true → run-the-checklist → APPROVE.
